title: Ken Houston's Calendar and Communications Regarding Flock Safety Cameras and ALPRs

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

- Copies of ALL communications from (and to) District 7 Council Member Ken Houston regarding FLOCK and ANY other surveillance technology firm from Jan 6, 2025 to the current date. 

- Copies of District 7 Council Member Ken Houston's calendar and ANY appointments made with FLOCK, Automatic License Plate Reader (ALPR) companies and advocates, and Oakland Police officials, from Jan 6, 2025 to the current date.

- Copies of District 7 Council Member Ken Houston's administrative staff's calendars and communications with outside entities pertaining to the following key terms: FLOCK, "AUTOMATIC LICENSE PLATE READER", Surveillance, Police, Drones

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Gabriel Lopez
